title: Binary's Classic Minecraft Modpack
description: Classic Minecraft, but with some visual tweaks.
body:
# Binary's Classic Minecraft Modpack
I wanted to play some good old fashioned Vanilla Minecraft for my [YouTube Series](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=T_Sf2Rt5S9E&list=PLir0xFpj1ZKPdiEiEphHs3yuKG-l3pyPa), but with a few visual improvements from mods and resourcepacks.

These changes are **only** visual and does not have an impact of the mechanics :)

## Vanilla Tweaks
In my series I'm also using a texturepack from Vanilla Tweaks and a few datapacks, both which can be found here:
 - [Vanilla Tweaks Texturepack](https://vanillatweaks.net/share/#yqXNBf)
 - [Vanilla Tweaks Datapacks](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#VerWm4)
